---
title: "Specialized research area"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: darkly
    css: darkly_custom.css
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    collapsed: false
    number_sections: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Environmental Pollution, Public Health, and Economic Policy Innovation

I am a specialist in environmental pollution, public health, and economic policy innovation research, with a focus on linking environmental degradation to health outcomes and developing evidence-based policy frameworks for sustainable development.

### Anthropogenic and human induced environmental pollutions

- Arsenic contamination, salinity, indoor air pollution, nitrogen (N) pollution, chemical poisoning of soil, CO2 emission

### Health risk for human and environment  

- Cardiovascular diseases, chronic disease, biodiversity loss

### Evidence based Bottom up and top down economic policy measures

- Future design, social experiments, lab experiments, UN inclusive wealth
